commentaire: Good match as it combines automation and software troubleshooting in a technical environment, fitting the 2-year experience bracket with internship/work-study.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Product Engineer role at Anradus. I saw you need someone to set up semiconductor equipment and collaborate with software teams to improve system designs. My background in both low-level C++ development and automation fits this mix of hardware and software troubleshooting perfectly.

I currently work at EXAIL Robotics on eye-tracking systems. I redesigned our installation process, which used to take 2 days. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time. For my own projects, I built a real estate platform called ValoFenua. It uses a daily scraper for 1,300 listings and an AI agent to process market data through n8n workflows.

I have experience documenting engineering enhancements and working with cross-functional teams to solve system bugs. I'm used to high-precision environments where software needs to interact perfectly with physical equipment.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering in 2026. I'm ready to apply my automation skills to your semiconductor equipment projects and support your international field operations.

Aodren Gloux
aodren.gloux@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/aodren-gloux | github.com/GAodren
